notes.sg-cell-biology-stem-cell: This is a more general term than neural stem cell, which is more relevant to neuroscience.
notes.sg-cell-biology-progenitor-cell: Embryonic stem cells are a type of progenitor cell, and this is more specific.
notes.sg-cell-biology-subventricular-zone: This is a specific location where neurogenesis occurs, and neural stem cells are found there. Merging to neural stem cell for better specificity.
notes.sg-cell-biology-subgranular-zone: This is a specific location where neurogenesis occurs, and granule cells are found there. Merging to granule cell for better specificity.
